CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Illegal Immigration Reform and Immigrant Responsibility Act of 1996, and also as part of the Omnibus Consolidated Appropriations Act, 1997, and not as part of the Immigration and Nationality Act which comprises this chapter.

Abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service and Transfer of FunctionsFor abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service, transfer of functions, and treatment of related references, see note set out under .section 1551 of this title

children.heading: Public charge deportations
children.label: 1 Public charge deportations
children.text: The number of aliens deported on public charge grounds under section 1227(a)(5) of this title during the previous fiscal year.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Indigent sponsors
children.label: 2 Indigent sponsors
children.text: The number of determinations made under during the previous fiscal year.section 1631(e) of this title

children.heading: Reimbursement actions
children.label: 3 Reimbursement actions
children.text: The number of actions brought, and the amount of each action, for reimbursement under (including private collections) for the costs of providing public benefits.section 1183a of this title
